senses.gloss: to grant, to give; to provide with, to supply with, to favor with

examples.text: الله يَرْزُقُ الإنسَان بِالرِّزْقِ الحَلالِ والطيب.
examples.english: Allah provides humans with lawful and good sustenance.

senses.gloss: to grant, to give; to provide with the means of subsistence, to provide for, to enrich
to grant, to give; to allot to, to bless with, to endow with
to grant, to give; to bestow on, to confer on

etymology.text:
Etymology tree
Middle Persian 𐭫𐭥𐭰𐭩𐭪 (rōzīg)der.
Arabic رزق
Derived from Middle Persian 𐭫𐭥𐭰𐭩𐭪 (rōzīg, “daily bread, sustenance”). Compare Persian روزی (rôzi).

Etymology tree
Middle Persian 𐭫𐭥𐭰𐭩𐭪 (rōzīg)der.
Arabic رِزْق (rizq)denom.
Arabic رزق
Denominal verb from رِزْق (rizq).
